title: crataegus mollis var. meridionalis
intro: Crataegus mollis var. meridionalis, also known as a southern hawthorn, is a specific variety of the Crataegus mollis species, a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus mollis var. meridionalis include reduced blood pressure, improved cardiovascular function, and enhanced immune system function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used to support heart health and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes.
